# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading SimpleWebApp from net8.0 to net9.0 and applying .NET modernization best practices: minimal hosting model (merge Startup.cs into Program.cs), nullable reference types, and implicit usings. Using All-at-Once strategy on this single-project solution.

**Progress**: 2/2 tasks complete <progress value="100" max="100"></progress> 100%

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-upgrade-and-modernize: Upgrade SimpleWebApp to net9.0 with modernization improvements ([Content](tasks/01-upgrade-and-modernize/task.md), [Progress](tasks/01-upgrade-and-modernize/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 02-final-validation: Final validation ([Content](tasks/02-final-validation/task.md), [Progress](tasks/02-final-validation/progress-details.md))
